location: A 2% drop from hatchet-wielding Fanged Imp enemies. Stormfoot Catacombs in western Limgrave — reached from the Stormfoot Catacombs grace just past the entrance — is a reliable early farming spot; Imps carrying it also turn up in other catacombs such as Murkwater.
tactics: Stormfoot Catacombs sits west and north of the Church of Elleh; Imps swarm almost immediately after entering, so fight them in the entry doorway to avoid being surrounded
2% is a low drop rate — resting at the grace and returning respawns the Imps for repeat attempts
Imps carrying different weapons look alike until they swing, so don't assume every Imp in a room is holding this specific hatchet
lore: A hatchet favored by the Lands Between's imp creatures, its blade curved into a forked shape nicknamed an 'imp's tongue' for the way it seems to lap blood from a wound.

builds.name: Dex bleed poke
builds.why: Heavy Dexterity scaling plus an innate 50 Blood Loss buildup makes it a fast status-stacking option for a Dexterity build.

builds.name: Keen-infused quickstep bleed
builds.why: Lightest axe in the base game (2.5 weight) with strong Dexterity scaling under Keen affinity, suited to a mobile quickstep-and-bleed playstyle.
